description_long: This rifle features a classic wooden stock with a rich, dark brown finish, extending into a long, blued steel barrel. The receiver and bolt assembly are metallic, with visible iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel. The trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower section, with the magazine appearing to be internal. The rifle's design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century military bolt-action rifles, with a straight comb and a fixed buttstock. Metal hardware, including the bolt handle and barrel bands, contrasts with the wood grain of the stock. The overall appearance is robust and utilitarian, suitable for both military and civilian use.
description: A long, bolt-action rifle with a dark wooden stock and blued steel barrel, featuring iron sights and a fixed internal magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the continuous wood-to-metal transition.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the width of the buttstock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
